title: Kth Smallest Element In BST

class Solution:

	def kthsmallest(self, A, B):

hints: Use inorder traversal to get elements in sorted order (for BST).
Inorder traversal visits nodes in ascending order: left -> root -> right.
You can use iterative approach with a stack to avoid recursion overhead.
Keep a counter to track how many elements you've visited.
When counter equals B, return the current node's value.
If you reach the end without finding B elements, handle edge cases appropriately.
For iterative approach: push all left nodes first, then pop and process, then go right.
